title: notodanthonia gracilis
intro: Notodanthonia gracilis, also known as the slender danthonia, is a type of grass native to Australia. It has been traditionally used by the indigenous Australians for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Notodanthonia gracilis are said to include relief from fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to aid in wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant can be used as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, although its use is largely anecdotal and more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness.
